response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong web/backend depth, but the role requires 8+ years of C++ and 5+ years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or production cloud architecture experience. Core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with staff/senior titles and mentoring/teaching track record
Experience with distributed, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source platforms, and course creation
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience at National Instruments — far short of the 8-year C++ requirement
No evidence of building or leading an internal cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not the systems/compute/hardware focus the role demands

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Breadth of senior engineering and mentoring experience
